title: Roost
hook: Net fluttering bats in a moonlit cave - every species you catch adds its own voice to the cave song.
hook_ru: Лови порхающих летучих мышей в лунной пещере - каждый пойманный вид добавляет свой голос в песню пещеры.

idea.title: Roost
idea.hook: A night-cave bat collector where your catches ARE the music: tap fluttering bats to net them, and every species you roost adds its own distinct call layered onto one shared WebAudio tempo grid - the cave's soundscape grows and evolves as your collection does (the trick that made bandlings work).
idea.prototype: Portrait night sky over a cave mouth. Bats drift across in arcing flight paths; TAP a bat to net it (satisfying catch SFX + species call joins the loop). TAP empty sky to send a sonar ECHO pulse that lures nearby bats toward the ping and reveals cloaked rares (swarm-herding flavor). Catches bank 'echoes' (currency). Each of 6 species is a timbre family on a tier lane: t1 click/perc, t2 chirp, t3 warble/arp, t4 cry/lead, t5 drone/pad, t6 (mythic) choir-shimmer. Per-bat pattern derives from (player seed ^ bat uid), so every player hears their own evolving cave. RETENTION META: a species DEX/album (rarity ladder Common->Uncommon->Rare->Epic->Mythic with a PITY counter that guarantees a rare every N catches), a NIGHTLY daily bonus (free lure batch, monotonic-clock guard), and OVERNIGHT IDLE accrual ('bats roosted while you were away' - the roost passively attracts bats when closed, capped at ~8h). Echoes buy net upgrades (catch radius), lure upgrades (pulse strength), and roost slots (more simultaneous singers = richer song). Remote-config: lure costs, idle rate, daily reward, event flags, motd live-tunable via GF.remoteConfig.
idea.non_timer_pressure: roost slot scarcity (more singers = louder/richer soundscape but slots cost escalating echoes) + escalating lure cost; rares only appear under echo pulses so the player must spend pulses to complete the dex
idea.lose_condition: no hard lose - this is a cozy collect-and-listen loop; a 'night' is a 90s wave with a target catch count; missing the target just ends the night with the echoes you banked (no game-over screen punishment), banking into persistent best + dex
idea.why_novel: second game in the portfolio where AUDIO IS THE CORE (after bandlings) but a TAP-TO-CATCH arcade collector rather than a merge stage - the evolving soundscape is the catch hook, the dex+pity+idle is the retention hook

sources.title: NEW GAME: bat collector (with sounds)
sources.snippet: Night/cave themed collector; gather/lure bats; each bat species = a distinct call/note layered on the shared WebAudio tempo grid (the bandlings trick - the collection becomes an evolving soundscape) + satisfying catch SFX. Retention: species dex (rarity ladder + pity), nightly daily bonus + overnight idle 'bats roosted while away' accrual. Portrait-first.

synthesizer_brief: Manual build authorized by Tim 2026-06-13 (P4). Vanilla JS canvas per the A/B alternation rule (assigned explicitly: 176 is the phaser build running in parallel, so 177=vanilla). Fresh template gf-lib.js shipped for seed-derived music variety. WebAudio tempo grid hosts both the gf-lib procedural bed (GF.startMusic) AND the in-game species-call layer scheduled in lockstep, so the catches sound musical against the backing. Idle accrual + daily + dex are the retention levers (apartment_cleaner test: a returning player sees overnight roost arrivals + a fresh daily lure + dex progress, all grown from the catch loop's own fabric, not bolted-on meta).
